impact.gdpr: Article 32 - Encryption requirement for personal data
impact.pci: Requirement 3.4 - Render PAN unreadable via encryption

data_security_context.sensitive_data_context:
Encryption is mandatory for all resources containing:
    - PII (personally identifiable information)
    - PCI data (credit card information)
    - PHI (protected health information)
    - Financial records

    - PCI data (credit card information)
    - PHI (protected health information)
    - Financial records
